channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: How to find and cancel your unused subscriptions
item.description: Subscriptions are out of control. I can remember a time when the monthly payouts were few: just Netflix, a couple of magazines and a mobile plan. Now we have subscriptions for music, security cameras, cloud gaming, AI chatbots, meal kits, LinkedIn, DoorDash, Uber, Photoshop — the list is long. Basically, if there’s an app for something, there’s likely an associated subscription available, too. This guide was put together to help you locate and cancel the subscriptions that are no longer serving you. That way, you won’t end up paying for something you don’t use. Every time I go through this pro...

item.title: Yahoo CEO Jim Lanzone on reviving the web’s homepage
item.description: Today, I’m talking with Jim Lanzone, who is the CEO of Yahoo. It’s basically impossible to sum up the Yahoo story, but the short version of it is that a long time ago Yahoo paid Google to run the search box on its website, and basically everything has gone sideways since. You’ll hear Jim refer […]

item.title: Massive Interpol operation takes down 45,000 IP addresses and leads to 94 arrests
item.description: Operation Synergia III took half a year and included 72 countries

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Tuesday, March 17 (game #1513)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Tuesday, March 17 (game #1010)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Tuesday, March 17 (game #744)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: This chair gives half-worn clothes a home
item.description: Seating technology may have reached its peak for those of us who struggle to keep our lightly worn clothing piles away from furniture. The Laundry Chair - developed by YouTuber and viral inventor Simone Giertz - is now available to buy through a Kickstarter campaign, providing a storage solution that still functions as a usable […]

item.title: Triple ration de Matinale : voici notre joli programme Twitch de la semaine
item.description: Notre programme Twitch de la semaine du lundi 16 mars 2026, c’est juste ici : nous vous donnons rendez-vous, mardi, mercredi et jeudi sur notre chaîne Frandroidlive, pour une triple Matinale Tech', trois jours consécutifs.

item.title: Tech companies are teaming up to combat scammers
item.description: A coalition of Big Tech companies is working on a more comprehensive solution to combat online scams. As first reported by Axios, Google, Microsoft, LinkedIn, Meta, Amazon, OpenAI, Adobe and Match Group announced the signing of the Online Services Accord Against Scams. The new agreement is meant to put up a united industry-wide front against online fraud and scams, particularly those from sophisticated criminal networks that use multiple platforms. According to the Axios report, the measures will include adding fraud detection tools, introducing new user security features, and requiring more r...

item.title: Boulanger fait mieux que les Ventes Flash d’Amazon avec ce pack Samsung Galaxy Z Flip 7 + Galaxy Watch 8 à -30 %
item.description: Boulanger contre Amazon et lance ses ventes flash : pour ce dernier jour, l'enseigne propose un pack incluant le dernier pliant de Samsung, le Z Flip 7, avec la Galaxy Watch 8 avec près de 30 % de remise.

item.title: How to watch Jensen Huang’s Nvidia GTC 2026 keynote — and what to expect
item.description: GTC is Nvidia's flagship annual event, where the chipmaker typically announces new products, partnerships, and its vision for the future of computing. Huang's keynote will focus on Nvidia's role in the future of computing and AI.

item.title: Le guide comparatif des meilleurs robots tondeuses connectés de 2026
item.description: Les robots tondeuses s'occupent de la pelouse à notre place. Mais comment choisir parmi les nombreux modèles disponibles en 2026 ? Nous avons testé et sélectionné pour vous les meilleures tondeuses robots disponibles à tous les prix.

item.title: Amazon just announced a huge spring sale — here's when it starts, plus early deals I'd shop now from $14.99
item.description: Amazon has announced a 'Big Spring Sale' on March 25, and I've rounded up the 15 best early deals I'd buy right now, plus everything else you need to know about the upcoming sale.

item.title: Samsung has reportedly restarted work on OLED-busting 'QNED' TV tech — no, not the kind that LG sells, a whole other type of QNED
item.description: Samsung has reportedly restarted development of 'True QNED' displays, because we don't have enough acronyms for all the TV developments happening

item.title: Apple quietly launches AirPods Max 2
item.description: The successor to its premium headphones cost $549 and are launching with enhanced active noise cancellation, the H2 chip, live translation, better sound quality, and more.

item.title: iRobot intends to define a new era in home robotics
item.description: iRobot is a pioneering brand reinventing itself to lead the next generation of innovation

item.title: La prochaine puce de Nvidia serait vraiment différente des autres
item.description: Après des années à fabriquer des GPU, Nvidia pourrait changer de stratégie en dévoilant une puce éloignée du principe « tout-en-un » auquel l'entreprise est habituée.

item.title: After Five Years, Apple Announces AirPods Max 2 Out of Nowhere
item.description: The AirPods Max 2 have the same (high) price as the original with a new chip, more features, and better ANC.

item.title: ‘Invincible’ Is Back in Fighting Form—Its Animation, Not So Much
item.description: Prime Video’s gnarly superhero series continues to adapt Robert Kirkman’s comic with a deft hand, but the push for a near‑annual release is leaving unmistakable marks on its animation quality.

item.title: Poland blocks cyberattack that targeted nuclear research facility
item.description: Politicians are blaming Iran but not everyone is sold on that idea.

item.title: Is Spotify finally fixing one of its biggest nits? Playlist folders could be coming to the mobile app, lifting its 16-year-long desktop-only access
item.description: Spotify could finally bring playlist folders to the mobile app after years of users desperately begging.

item.title: I watched the first 6 episodes of Invincible season 4 on Prime Video — and it 'continues to prove it's the best R-rated animated show around'
item.description: Mark Grayson battles new enemies and himself in the Amazon TV Original's darkest and most significant season so far.

item.title: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 6 : cet excellent smartphone pliable est à moitié prix pour la fin des ventes flash de printemps sur Amazon
item.description: Le Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 6 se plie au jeu des promotions lors des ventes flash du printemps sur Amazon et passe de 1 999 euros à sa sortie à 999 euros aujourd'hui.

item.title: Apple launches AirPods Max 2 with improved noise cancelling and smart features
item.description: Apple has launched the Airpods Max 2, an improved version of its flagship, over-the-ear headphones.

item.title: Hulu sent the highly anticipated Buffy: New Sunnydale series to an early grave — and I'm canceling my subscription immediately
item.description: Buffy: New Sunnydale is dead, and so is my faith in Hulu after this baffling decision.

item.title: This amazing all-in-one wireless inkjet is half price — HP Envy Photo printer is on sale for under $110, and comes with 5 months of free Instant Ink
item.description: HP Envy Photo 7275 all-in-one printer handles printing, scanning, and copying, and with a huge discount it’s currently under $110.

item.title: Apple announces the AirPods Max 2 with improved noise cancelation and H2 chip
item.description: The AirPods Max 2 are almost here. Apple announced this morning that the first true update to its over-hear phones are up for pre-order on March 25 and will be shipping in early April. They look identical to the predecessor, with large, colorful earcups and a matching headband. But inside is the H2 chip that Apple first introduced with the AirPods Pro 2, which enables a host of new features. Chief among those is improved noise cancelation — Apple says with the H2 and improved audio algorithms, the AirPods Max 2 are 1.5 times more effective at reducing noise than the old model. From an audio pe...

item.title: Terry Matalas Teases Ultron’s Return in ‘Vision Quest’
item.description: Plus, production has begun on Mike Flanagan's The Exorcist.

item.title: Apple’s $549 AirPods Max 2 add better ANC and live translation
item.description: Apple has just announced the AirPods Max 2 with better noise cancellation and sound quality. The second generation of Apple's over-ear headphones starts at $549 and comes equipped with an H2 chip that powers a bunch of new features, including AI-powered live translation, which translates speech to your preferred language in real-time. As noted by […]...

item.title: Companies House online filing back to normal after glitch allowed users to change directors' details
item.description: In theory, someone could have exfiltrated sensitive data, but it would be an extremely tedious undertaking.

item.title: Surprise, Apple lance les AirPods Max 2
item.description: Allons bon, personne n'y croyait plus vraiment mais voilà, tout finit toujours par arriver : 5 ans après la première génération, Apple vient de dévoiler les AirPods Max 2, son nouveau casque très haut de gamme.

item.title: Krispy Kreme is giving away free green doughnuts for St. Patricks Day — how to claim yours
item.description: Krispy Kreme is giving away free Green O'riginal Glazed doughnut. No purchase is necessary, and the offer is good in-shop or drive-thru.

item.title: Apple annonce les AirPods Max 2 avec puce H2 et audio lossless : voici les nouveautés en détails
item.description: Apple a fini par craquer. Après une mise à jour USB-C en 2024 que tout le monde a déjà oubliée, les AirPods Max 2 sont là.

item.title: Apple finally launches AirPods Max 2, with all the features from AirPods Pro they've been missing — plus 'better Active Noise Cancellation, elevated sound quality'
item.description: 5 years later, we get the H2 chip and a ton of new features

item.title: Could weather apps cost the global economy tens of millions of dollars because of cloud-mongering?
item.description: Mobile weather apps displaying single-day icons mislead users, causing families to cancel trips and significant financial losses for UK attractions.
